title: Die grünen Teufel von Monte Cassino
writer: J. Joachim Bartsch, Michael Graf Saltikow, Albert Armin Lerche
actors: Joachim Fuchsberger, Elma Karlowa, Antje Geerk
plot: In 1944, German paratroopers must defend the Monte Cassino area of Italy from Allied attacks while artifacts from the nearby historical abbey are evacuated to the Vatican by army trucks.
